race.comment: SMART SHAZZA (9) has a handy record here at this circuit with a win and a placing from three attempts and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Should get a cosy run in transit from the inside marble and looks the one they all have to run down. LOVECATS (12) returned in fine fashion with a strong Sunny Coast win and does boast a placing over this track and trip. Can go back-to-back without surprising. GAYLORD (4) saves his best form for this distance range and only needs some luck from the sticky draw to feature in the outcome. MISS MCLAREN (8) is one from one at this circuit and strips fitter third-up from the spell. In the mix. NEPRAVDA (5) next best from the astute Heathcote yard.
